subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath guided us unto His path, made known unto us His proof, and unveiled before us the wondrous tokens of His grace and its manifestations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی هدانا الی سبیله و عرفنا دلیله و اوضح لنا بدایع فضله و ظهورات
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for pilgrims, @business; financial; property matters
